restaurants.name: Cafe Devdar
restaurants.ambience: Charming hill café with scenic outdoor seating surrounded by pine trees
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

restaurants.name: Himalayan Restaurant Khajjiar
restaurants.ambience: Simple yet popular restaurant offering hearty dishes
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

restaurants.name: Hotel Mini Switzerland Restaurant
restaurants.ambience: Peaceful restaurant with excellent views of surrounding forests and valley
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Khajjiar Meadow
attractions.description: Expansive lush green meadow with small lake in center, surrounded by tall cedar forests and Dhauladhar mountains backdrop, known as Mini Switzerland of India
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Khajji Nag Temple
attractions.description: Ancient 12th century temple dedicated to serpent deity Khajji Nag, built with beautiful wooden architecture and intricate carvings
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx
